function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"summary": "Generated BDD scenarios for hello-world-requirement-retry", "deliverable": {"scenarios": [{"given": "the API server is running", "when": "a GET request is sent to /goodbye", "then": ["a 200 status code is returned", "the response body contains JSON with message 'Goodbye, World!'"]}, {"given": "the API server is running with the /goodbye endpoint", "when": "the endpoint is called and the response is checked", "then": ["the Content-Type header is application/json", "the response is valid JSON"]}]}}
